settings.content: Adds extra product details not covered by the Vendor, SKU, or Inventory blocks above. New in Milestone 5.

settings.label: Show collections this product is in
Delivery estimate text
settings.info: Placeholder text only - not connected to a live shipping calculation.

settings.content: Adds a visual stock-level bar. Works alongside (does not replace) the existing Inventory block above, which already handles the low-stock text message and threshold.

settings.label: Show bar when stock is at or below
"Full stock" reference number
settings.info: Shopify doesn't expose a product's original/maximum stock level, so the bar fills relative to this reference number rather than a true "percent sold."

settings.label: Hide exact quantity (show a relative bar only)
Static message
settings.info: Used when mode is set to Static.

settings.content: Compares this product's price against a threshold. For a live, cart-total-aware version that updates as items are added, use the Secure checkout / free shipping bar in the cart drawer settings if your theme has one - this block is a simpler, product-price-only indicator.

settings.label: Free shipping threshold
settings.info: Enter a plain number in your shop's currency, e.g. 50

settings.label: Show accepted payment icons
settings.info: Uses the payment icons already enabled in Settings > Payments.

settings.content: Display technical specifications using Dynamic Sources or Metaobjects.
Display manuals, certificates or downloadable documents.
Display material composition and sustainability information.
Display sizing, measurements, or fit information.
Display warranty coverage and support information.
Display industry certifications or compliance standards.
Display advanced rich text and media content.
